forms.name: Name Clearance Application
forms.purpose: Reserve unique company name with RJSC

forms.name: Memorandum of Association (MoA)
forms.purpose: Defines company objectives, capital structure, and subscriber details. Object clauses must be within 400 words and 7 clauses.

forms.name: Articles of Association (AoA)
forms.purpose: Internal governance rules covering director powers, voting rights, and share transfer procedures

forms.name: Subscriber Sheet
forms.purpose: Lists all shareholders with share quantities, NID/passport details, and ownership percentages

forms.name: Declaration on Registration of Company
forms.purpose: Sworn declaration that all legal requirements of company formation under the Companies Act have been fulfilled. Without this the Registrar will not issue the Certificate of Incorporation.
forms.signed_by: Advocate / Attorney / Director / Manager / Secretary of proposed company

forms.name: Notice of Situation of Registered Office
forms.purpose: Declares the official physical address of the company. Also used for any future change of registered office address.

forms.name: Consent to Act as Director
forms.purpose: Each director individually consents to serve in that role. Includes NID, TIN, passport details. One form required per director.

forms.name: List of Persons Consenting to be Directors
forms.purpose: Consolidated list of all directors who have provided consent via Form IX

forms.name: Particulars of Directors, Manager and Managing Agents
forms.purpose: Full particulars of all directors including name, address, nationality, occupation, and TIN

supporting_documents.name: NID Copies (all directors and shareholders)
supporting_documents.notes: Bangladeshi nationals: National ID. Foreign nationals: Passport copy.

supporting_documents.name: e-TIN Certificate (all directors)
supporting_documents.notes: Individual TIN of each director required

supporting_documents.name: Bank Certificate or Encashment Certificate
supporting_documents.notes: Local companies: simple bank certificate. Foreign shareholders: Encashment Certificate from scheduled bank is mandatory.

supporting_documents.name: Proof of Registered Address
supporting_documents.notes: Rent agreement, utility bill, or ownership deed. PO boxes are not acceptable.

supporting_documents.name: Treasury Challan / Payment Slip
supporting_documents.notes: Proof of registration fee payment at designated bank. Fee is tiered by authorized capital.

supporting_documents.name: Special Adhesive Stamps
supporting_documents.notes: Stamp duty on MoA and AoA. Paid at BRAC Bank or Sonali Bank.

forms.name: e-TIN Registration
forms.purpose: Company Tax Identification Number from NBR portal

forms.name: VAT/BIN Registration
forms.purpose: Business Identification Number for VAT compliance
forms.authority: NBR — Customs, Excise and VAT Commissionerate
forms.deadline: Before first taxable sale. Mandatory if turnover exceeds BDT 30 lakh.

forms.name: Trade License Application
forms.purpose: Legal authority to operate in the designated area. Required by all businesses.
forms.authority: City Corporation (DNCC/DSCC), Pourashava, or Union Parishad based on address

forms.name: Board Resolution for Bank Account Opening
forms.purpose: Authorizes specific signatories to open the company bank account

forms.name: Notice by Auditor upon Appointment
forms.purpose: Newly appointed auditor notifies RJSC of acceptance of appointment

forms.name: Annual Summary of Share Capital and List of Shareholders and Directors
forms.purpose: Annual return summarizing share capital structure and full list of current shareholders and directors
forms.deadline: Within 21 days of Annual General Meeting (AGM)

forms.name: Balance Sheet
forms.purpose: Audited financial position statement

forms.name: Profit and Loss Account
forms.purpose: Financial performance statement for the financial year

forms.name: Notice by Auditor upon Appointment
forms.purpose: Filed at each AGM when auditor is appointed or reappointed

forms.name: Notice of Consolidation, Division, or Conversion of Shares
forms.purpose: Filed when shares are consolidated (merged) or subdivided into smaller denominations

forms.name: Notice of Increase in Share Capital
forms.purpose: Filed when authorized capital is increased by board or shareholder resolution

forms.name: Notice of Change of Registered Office
forms.purpose: Filed when company changes its official registered address

forms.name: Return of Special Resolutions and Alterations to MoA or AoA
forms.purpose: Filed when a special resolution is passed — e.g., change of company name, objects clause, or capital structure
forms.trigger: Special resolution passed at EGM or AGM

forms.name: Change in Director Particulars
forms.purpose: Filed when a director is appointed, resigns, or any personal details change
forms.trigger: Director appointment, resignation, or detail change

forms.name: Return of Allotment of Shares
forms.purpose: Filed when new shares are issued to new or existing shareholders

forms.name: Particulars of Mortgage or Charge
forms.purpose: Filed when company creates a mortgage or charge over its assets as loan collateral
forms.trigger: Creation of mortgage or charge (e.g., bank loan secured on assets)

forms.name: Modification of Mortgage or Charge
forms.purpose: Filed when the terms of an existing registered mortgage or charge are changed

forms.name: Memorandum of Satisfaction of Mortgage
forms.purpose: Filed when a mortgage or charge is fully repaid and discharged
forms.trigger: Full repayment and discharge of mortgage

forms.name: Instrument of Transfer of Shares
forms.purpose: Formal instrument recording the transfer of shares from one shareholder to another

forms.name: Name Clearance Application
forms.purpose: Reserve unique company name with RJSC

forms.name: Memorandum of Association (MoA)
forms.purpose: Defines company objectives, capital structure, and subscriber details

forms.name: Articles of Association (AoA)
forms.purpose: Internal governance rules for directors, shareholders, meetings, and share transfers

forms.name: Subscriber Sheet
forms.purpose: Lists all founding shareholders with share quantities and identity details

phase_1_incorporation.label: Incorporation — Statutory Forms
phase_1_incorporation.note: Includes all forms required for private limited company PLUS the following additional forms

additional_forms.name: Agreement to Take Qualification Shares in Proposed Company
additional_forms.purpose: Agreement by a director to acquire the minimum qualifying shares required under the Articles of Association before taking office
additional_forms.required_when: Director does not already hold the qualifying shares at the time of incorporation

additional_forms.name: Declaration before Commencing Business
additional_forms.purpose: Statutory declaration confirming the company has satisfied all conditions required to commence business. Public companies cannot trade until this is filed.
additional_forms.required_when: Company files Statement in lieu of Prospectus instead of a full Prospectus

additional_forms.name: Prospectus or Statement in Lieu of Prospectus
additional_forms.purpose: Prospectus: required if raising capital from the public. Statement in Lieu of Prospectus: required if not inviting public subscription but still subject to public company rules.
additional_forms.required_when: Before any public share offering or before commencing business without a prospectus

supporting_documents.name: NID Copies (all directors and shareholders)
supporting_documents.notes: Bangladeshi nationals: National ID. Foreign nationals: Passport.

supporting_documents.name: Bank Certificate or Encashment Certificate
supporting_documents.notes: Local shareholders: bank certificate. Foreign shareholders: Encashment Certificate mandatory.

supporting_documents.name: Proof of Registered Address
supporting_documents.notes: Rent agreement, utility bill, or ownership deed. PO boxes not accepted.

supporting_documents.name: Treasury Challan / Payment Slip
supporting_documents.notes: Registration fee paid at designated bank, tiered by authorized capital

supporting_documents.name: Special Adhesive Stamps
supporting_documents.notes: Stamp duty on MoA and AoA

forms.name: e-TIN Registration
forms.purpose: Company Tax Identification Number from NBR portal

forms.name: VAT/BIN Registration
forms.purpose: Business Identification Number for VAT compliance
forms.authority: NBR — Customs, Excise and VAT Commissionerate

forms.name: Trade License Application
forms.purpose: Legal authority to operate in designated area
forms.authority: City Corporation, Pourashava, or Union Parishad

forms.name: Board Resolution for Bank Account Opening
forms.purpose: Authorizes signatories to open company bank account

forms.name: Statutory Report
forms.purpose: Report to shareholders detailing share allotments, cash received, preliminary expenses, and key contracts. Filed with RJSC.

forms.name: Statutory Meeting
forms.purpose: First general meeting of shareholders — mandatory for public companies

forms.name: Notice by Auditor upon Appointment
forms.purpose: Newly appointed auditor notifies RJSC of acceptance of appointment

forms.name: BSEC Registration
forms.purpose: Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission registration — required if company intends to list on DSE or CSE and offer shares to the public
forms.applies_to: Public companies intending to list only

forms.name: Annual Summary of Share Capital and List of Shareholders and Directors
forms.purpose: Annual return of share capital and full shareholders/directors list

forms.name: Balance Sheet
forms.purpose: Audited financial position statement

forms.name: Profit and Loss Account
forms.purpose: Annual financial performance statement

forms.name: Directors Report
forms.purpose: Board report on company performance, future plans, and governance. Filed with Balance Sheet.
forms.deadline: With Balance Sheet, within 30 days of AGM

forms.name: Statutory Report (Annual)
forms.purpose: Annual detailed operations and financial report for public companies

forms.name: Notice by Auditor upon Appointment
forms.purpose: Filed each year at AGM when auditor is appointed or reappointed

phase_4_event_triggered.label: Event-Triggered Returns
phase_4_event_triggered.note: Identical to private limited company event-triggered forms

forms.name: Notice of Consolidation, Division, or Conversion of Shares
Notice of Increase in Share Capital
Notice of Change of Registered Office
Return of Special Resolutions and Alterations to MoA or AoA
forms.trigger: Special resolution at EGM or AGM

forms.name: Change in Director Particulars
forms.trigger: Director appointment, resignation, or detail change

forms.name: Memorandum of Satisfaction of Mortgage
forms.trigger: Full repayment and discharge of mortgage

foreign_company.note: A company incorporated outside Bangladesh establishing a place of business in Bangladesh as a Branch Office or Liaison/Representative Office. Does not go through name clearance. Registers its existing foreign company name directly.

phase_1_registration.label: Registration — Statutory Forms (Unique to Foreign Companies)

forms.name: Charter, Statutes, Memorandum and Articles of Association
forms.purpose: Certified copy of the parent company's constitutional documents from its home country — the foreign equivalent of MoA and AoA

forms.name: Notice of Address of the Registered or Principal Office of the Company
forms.purpose: Declares the full address of the parent company's head office in its home country

forms.name: List of Directors and Managers
forms.purpose: Complete list of all directors and managers of the parent company including names, nationalities, and addresses

forms.name: Return of Persons Authorized to Accept Service
forms.purpose: Names the person or persons in Bangladesh who are authorized to receive legal notices and service of process on behalf of the foreign company

forms.name: Notice of Situation of Principal Place of Business in Bangladesh
forms.purpose: Declares the address of the company's principal place of business in Bangladesh. Also used to notify any future change in Bangladesh office address.

supporting_documents.name: Certificate of Incorporation of Parent Company
supporting_documents.purpose: Certified copy from home country confirming legal existence of the parent company
supporting_documents.requirement: Must be notarized and apostilled or legalized by Bangladesh Embassy. Must be in English or accompanied by certified English translation.

supporting_documents.name: MoA and AoA of Parent Company (3 copies)
supporting_documents.purpose: Certified copies of the parent company's constitutional documents
supporting_documents.requirement: Certified copy; in English or with certified translation

supporting_documents.name: Board Resolution of Parent Company
supporting_documents.purpose: Parent company board resolution approving the establishment of operations in Bangladesh

supporting_documents.name: Power of Attorney
supporting_documents.purpose: Authorizes a local representative in Bangladesh to act on behalf of the parent company for registration and operational purposes
supporting_documents.requirement: Notarized and authenticated by Bangladesh Embassy in home country

supporting_documents.name: Passport Copies of All Directors
supporting_documents.purpose: Identity verification for all directors of the parent company

supporting_documents.name: Encashment Certificate
supporting_documents.purpose: Proof of inward remittance of minimum required capital from overseas. SWIFT transfer must reference Equity Investment.
supporting_documents.requirement: Minimum USD 50,000 for Liaison Office. Issued by a scheduled bank in Bangladesh.

supporting_documents.name: BIDA Permission
supporting_documents.purpose: Bangladesh Investment Development Authority approval — mandatory for all foreign companies establishing any presence in Bangladesh

supporting_documents.name: Bangladesh Bank Approval
supporting_documents.purpose: Bangladesh Bank permission for foreign exchange transactions and capital remittance
supporting_documents.required_for: Branch Offices engaged in revenue-generating business activities. Not required for non-commercial Liaison Offices.

supporting_documents.name: Auditor Report of Parent Company (last year)
supporting_documents.purpose: Most recent audited financial statements of the parent company
supporting_documents.requirement: Certified copy; translated to English if required

forms.name: e-TIN Registration
forms.purpose: Company Tax Identification Number from NBR portal

forms.name: VAT/BIN Registration
forms.purpose: Business Identification Number for VAT — mandatory for all operating entities

forms.name: Trade License Application
forms.purpose: Legal authority to operate in the designated area

forms.name: Annual Financial Statements (Bangladesh Operations)
forms.purpose: Audited financial accounts of the Bangladesh branch or liaison operations
forms.deadline: Within 6 months of financial year end

forms.name: BIDA Quarterly FDI Report
forms.purpose: Mandatory quarterly reporting of foreign direct investment transactions to BIDA

forms.name: Bangladesh Bank Foreign Exchange Report
forms.purpose: Reporting of all foreign exchange transactions as required

forms.name: Notice by Auditor upon Appointment
forms.purpose: Auditor notifies RJSC of appointment

forms.name: Notice of Alteration in Address of Registered or Principal Office of Parent Company
forms.purpose: Filed when the parent company's head office address changes in its home country
forms.trigger: Change of parent company head office address

forms.name: Notice of Change in Principal Place of Business in Bangladesh
forms.purpose: Filed when the Bangladesh office address changes

forms.name: Updated List of Directors and Managers
forms.purpose: Filed when the parent company appoints new directors or existing directors change
forms.trigger: Change in parent company board of directors

forms.name: Change of Authorized Local Representative
forms.purpose: Filed when the person authorized to accept service in Bangladesh changes
forms.trigger: Change of Bangladesh authorized agent or representative

forms.name: Particulars of Mortgage or Charge
forms.trigger: Creation of mortgage or charge over Bangladesh assets

forms.name: Memorandum of Satisfaction of Mortgage
forms.trigger: Full repayment and discharge of mortgage

master_comparison_matrix.description: Which forms apply to which company type

forms.form: Form X — List of Consenting Directors

forms.public_limited_note: Required only if director does not already hold qualifying shares

forms.form: Form XIV — Declaration before Commencing Business
Prospectus or Statement in Lieu of Prospectus
Form XXXVII — Foreign Registered Office Address
Form III — Share Consolidation or Division
Form XLI — Foreign Office Address Change
